Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single product available for sale in the inventory, managed via barcode or manual entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity. This is typically the EAN-13 barcode of the product.

name.description: The name or title of the product.

price.description: The current selling price of a single unit of the product. This value is used for sales and can be edited.

stock.description: The available quantity of the product currently in stock. This value is updated upon sale finalization.

category.description: The category the product belongs to (e.g., 'Bebidas', 'Snacks', 'Lácteos').

Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: Represents a completed sales transaction, including products sold and manual entries.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sale entity.

saleDateTime.description: The date and time when the sale was finalized.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the sale, including all products and manual items.

productSaleItemIds.description: References to ProductSaleItem entities associated with this sale, detailing each product sold.

manualSaleItemIds.description: References to ManualSaleItem entities associated with this sale, detailing calculator-added items.

ProductSaleItem.title: ProductSaleItem
ProductSaleItem.description: Represents a specific product and its details as a line item within a particular sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductSaleItem entity.

saleId.description: Reference to the Sale this product item belongs to.

productName.description: The name of the product at the time of the sale.

unitPrice.description: The price of a single unit of the product at the time of the sale.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product sold.

subtotal.description: The total price for this specific product item.

category.description: The category of the product at the time of sale.

ManualSaleItem.title: ManualSaleItem
ManualSaleItem.description: Represents a manually entered item or value added to a sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ManualSaleItem entity.

saleId.description: Reference to the Sale this manual item belongs to.

description.description: A description for the manual item.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the manual item.

definition.description: Authorized users of the POS system.
